title: fritillaria pyrenaica var. hispanica
intro: Fritillaria pyrenaica var. hispanica, also known as the Spanish fritillaria, is a perennial plant species belonging to the lily family (Liliaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Fritillaria pyrenaica var. hispanica include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate sore throats. Fritillaria pyrenaica var. hispanica is typically prepared as a tincture, infusion, or powder, and is used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
